description: Merges all operand intervals into a single union set on a number line. Accepts 2 or more operands which can be interval, ray, ineq, absineq, or other set operation results.
utility: Compute and visualize union of interval sets on a number line

examples.expression:
N = nl(at(5, 2), range(-2, 10))
I1 = interval(N, 1, 4, type(closed), c(blue))
I2 = interval(N, 3, 7, type(closed), c(green))
U = nlunion(N, I1, I2, c(purple), buff(1))

N = nl(at(5, 2), range(-5, 10))
A = ineq(N, "x > 3", c(blue))
B = ineq(N, "x < -1", c(green))
U = nlunion(N, A, B, c(red), buff(1))
